rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for interface assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model when generating AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees should reference component ports only in valid component type scopes.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the analyzed AADL model.
Ensure AGREE expressions align with the actual AADL data types of ports and variables.
Avoid inserting implementation-specific bindings into component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type contracts should use visible feature names and constants from the model.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Do not assume numeric bounds for ports unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE annex placement in system implementations
